title: Mace Cooldown
description: Lightweight mod that adds a configurable cooldown to the mace smash attack when attacking a player
body:
# **Flopasss' Mace Cooldown**
A lightweight, highly configurable Minecraft mod designed to balance the Mace in PvP combat. This mod introduces a customizable cooldown specifically for player-versus-player interactions, ensuring the Mace remains a powerful tool without being overpowered.


## **Key Features**
- **Targeted Balancing**: Adds a cooldown to the Mace only when attacking other players.

- **Smart Mechanics**: Choose whether the cooldown applies to all Mace hits or specifically to high-damage "smash" attacks.

- **Flexible Restrictions**: Configure whether the cooldown prevents all Mace usage or only blocks subsequent smash attacks.

- **Player Preference System**: An optional system that lets players decide how they want to fight. If both the attacker and target have the cooldown disabled in their settings, the cooldown is bypassed. If either player prefers the cooldown, it remains active.


## Commands
### Operator Commands
```
/maceCooldown enabled <true/false>
```
Toggle the mod on or off.

```
/maceCooldown duration <ticks>
```
Set the length of the cooldown (20 ticks = 1 second).

```
/maceCooldown onlyApplyOnSmash <true/false>
```
If true, the cooldown only triggers on successful smash attacks. If false, it triggers on every Mace hit.

```
/maceCooldown onlyPreventSmash <true/false>
```
If true, players can still use normal Mace attacks while on cooldown, but cannot "smash." If false, all Mace attacks are blocked during the cooldown.

```
/maceCooldown playerCooldownPreference <true/false>
```
Enable or disable the Player Preference system.

### Player Commands
```
/maceCooldown preference set <true/false>
```
Set whether you prefer the cooldown to be active during your fights.

```
/maceCooldown preference info <player>
```
Check the preference setting of a specific player.
